ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "unique_subject_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subject involved in the adverse event */,
  "reported_term" TEXT /* The reported term for the adverse event */,
  "analysis_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the adverse event analysis */,
  "analysis_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the adverse event analysis */,
  "ae_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the adverse event in days */,
  "serious_event" TEXT /* Indicates whether the adverse event is serious (Y/N) */,
  "causality" TEXT /* The causality of the adverse event (e.g., POSSIBLE, PROBABLE) */,
  "arel" TEXT /* The relationship to the drug (e.g., RELATED, NOT RELATED) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* The outcome of the adverse event (e.g., RECOVERED/RESOLVED, NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study in which the adverse event occurred */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporter who recorded the adverse event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the adverse event */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* The name of the drug associated with the adverse event */,
  "dose" TEXT /* The dose of the drug at the time of the adverse event */,
  "route_of_administration" TEXT /* The route by which the drug was administered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of drug administration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* A version number to track changes to the adverse event record */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* A reason for any changes made to the adverse event record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_reported_term FOREIGN KEY ("reported_term") REFERENCES adverse_event_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_outcome FOREIGN KEY ("outcome") REFERENCES adverse_event_outcomes ("outcome_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_serious_event FOREIGN KEY ("serious_event") REFERENCES adverse_event_severities ("severity_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the study */,
  "phase" TEXT /* The phase of the clinical trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the study is being conducted */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* The number of participants in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reporter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reporter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reporter (e.g., clinical researcher, safety officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the reporter belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the reporter */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the reporter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the principal investigator is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the adverse event type (e.g., APPLICATION SITE IRRITATION) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the adverse event type (e.g., skin, gastrointestinal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_event_severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., MINOR, SERIOUS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "impact" TEXT /* A description of the impact of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_event_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., RECOVERED/RESOLVED, NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "follow_up_required" TEXT /* Indicates whether follow-up is required (Y/N) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* The date when follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
